name: che-keychain
description: Trust-isolated macOS keychain credential prompt — single signed binary that owns the input UI so callers (LLM agents, MCP servers, shell scripts) never see the typed value.

plugins.name: che-keychain
plugins.description: Native NSAlert credential prompt rendered inside a signed binary's own process. set / set-pair / has / unset subcommands. Wrapper auto-downloads CheKeychain binary from the GitHub Release to ~/bin/che-keychain on first invocation so other tools (CheTransportMCP --setup, scripts) can find it via PATH lookup.
